meaning: adj.愉快而激动的,非常漂亮的,极吸引人的
examples: The times are good. The living is easy. The vibes are zingy (Saturday Review).
Very clean zingy palate, with fresh citrus and gooseberry flavors in abundance, and balanced lingering acidity.
This lively wine has been carefully crafted to show great length of flavour with a refreshing, zingy and lively acidity on the finish.
The brave little 1.6-liter four works hard, delivering 138 horsepower and a rather zingy 123 pound-feet of torque.
But I was fortunate to have a new putter in the bag, a zingy-looking Titleist Futura model from famed designer Scotty Cameron.
